body:
## ≡ƒôï Ticket Information
- **Priority:** P1 (High)
- **Sprint:** Sprint 1 - Phase 2 (Solarpunk URP Pivot)
- **Type:** UI/UX
- **Dependency:** TICKET-001 (URP must be setup first)

## ≡ƒô¥ Description
Update sistem UI ke Hybrid HD Style seperti game Dave the Diver. Konsep utama:
- Vector/HD Containers: Clean, smooth edges untuk panels
- Pixel Art Icons: Consistent dengan game sprites (PPU 32)

## Γ£à Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] UI Canvas menggunakan Screen Space - Overlay atau Camera
- [ ] Panel/Container menggunakan HD sprites (smooth, not pixelated)
- [ ] Icons tetap pixel art style (PPU 32)
- [ ] Typography menggunakan clean font untuk readability
- [ ] Color scheme sesuai Solarpunk palette
- [ ] Responsive di berbagai resolusi (1080p - 4K)

## ≡ƒÄ¿ Color Palette
| Use | Color | Hex |
|-----|-------|-----|
| Primary BG | Dark Teal | #1A3A3A |
| Secondary BG | Sage Green | #9DC183 |
| Accent | Cream | #F5F5DC |
